title: Automated LeetCode Explainer Pipeline
description: Began engineering an automated video explanation pipeline in Python. Integrates Manim engine animation rendering, Chatterbox cloned voice synthesis, and LLM-based RAG script generation.

title: Initialized Portfolio v2 Architecture
description: Designed a dynamic, multi-persona developer platform utilizing React, Vite, Tailwind CSS v4, and strict TypeScript compilation layers.

title: GlobalSpaces Monorepo Development
description: Built the specs-first RESO-aligned real estate platform monorepo in March, May, and June using React 18, Express, Drizzle ORM, and PostgreSQL.

title: E-Signature & Adobe LMS integrations
description: Designed the React/Node.js Enterprise E-Signature Platform using Cursor AI, developing administrative maintenance mode locks, auto-save state controllers, signer email suppression layers, and PDF metadata extraction modules.

title: Event Espresso eCourse Importer
description: Started development of the CSV importer plugin and registrations cache tables in November to optimize registration comparisons.

title: Twilio SMS notification system
description: Initiated the Event Espresso status reminders and Twilio gateway sync handler (uniTech-event-notification) in October.

title: Joined UniversalTech & Started MSA Customization
description: Joined as a Junior Software Developer in July (officially in October) and started customization of the Motorcycle Safety Academy (MSA) plugin & child theme.

title: UFC Custom Block Engine Launch
description: Completed development on the UFC blocks plugin, delivering 33 Gutenberg React blocks, Swiper sliders, and local notifications cache endpoints.

title: Joined UniversalTech as Developer Intern
description: Started a 6-month software developer internship, undergoing intensive training in HTML/CSS/JS, Git/GitHub, Agile workflows, and Redmine.

title: B.Tech Computer Science Graduation
description: Graduated with a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science from Vishwakarma Institute of Technology, Pune (8.2 CGPA).

title: LeetCode Preparation & Technical Interviews
description: Focused on computer science fundamentals, data structures, algorithms (solving 800+ LeetCode questions), and competitive programming across LeetCode & Codeforces while actively giving technical interviews.

title: Published Music Generation Research Paper
description: Co-authored and published the research paper 'Automatic Music Melody Generation using LSTM and Markov Chain Model' at the ICTIS 2023 conference.

title: 10+2 (HSC) Graduation
description: Completed 10+2 higher secondary education from St. Xavier's Junior College, Shrirampur.
